displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Jar Jar's Big Day
synopsis: Has Jar Jar Binks become a Jedi? That's what everyone thinks as he sets out on a dangerous mission to rescue his friends Padmé Amidala and C-3PO from the clutches of the evil Separatist Alliance. Will the Force be with Jar Jar?
title: The Clone Wars: Jar Jar's Big Day
